title: Maximum Size
description: Depending on lot size and existing primary dwelling size.

title: Maximum Height
description: Generally 16ft for detached ADUs, higher for attached.

title: Parking
description: In most areas near transit or if replacing existing parking.

title: Owner Occupancy
description: Recent state laws have removed this requirement for most ADUs.

title: Setbacks
description: Most states now limit side and rear setbacks to a maximum of 4 feet.

title: Utility Connection
description: Connection to primary utilities allowed; separate meters optional in most cases.

title: Fire & Safety
description: Fire sprinklers only required if they are required in the primary dwelling.
